Section 312a, acts , ; , , covered disposition of electric power produced from Eklutna project, rate and rate schedules, sale preferences, disposition of receipts, and creation of a continuing fund.July 31, 1950, ch. 510, § 264 Stat. 382Aug. 13, 1953, ch. 430, § 1(3)67 Stat. 574

Section 312b, , , authorized Secretary of the Interior to perform the acts necessary to carry into effect Eklutna project and otherwise set out his powers and duties in connection with project.act July 31, 1950, ch. 510, § 364 Stat. 383

Section 312d, , , authorized Secretary to delegate the powers and functions given him in connection with the Eklutna project.act July 31, 1950, ch. 510, § 564 Stat. 383
